exec: pm.test("Registered user has candidate role", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().role).to.eql("CANDIDATE"); });
pm.test("Vacancy title updated", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().title).to.eql("Postman Senior Java developer"); });
pm.test("Candidate name updated", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.json().fullName).to.eql("Postman Candidate Updated"); });
pm.test("Application business operation works", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test("Schedule interview operation works", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test("Complete interview operation works", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
pm.test("Create offer operation works", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(201); });
pm.test("Accept offer operation works", function () { pm.response.to.have.status(200); });
